option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for the eureka-server service # Build stage FROM maven:3.8.8-openjdk-17 AS builder WORKDIR /workspace COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src/ RUN mvn -B -DskipTests package
# Run stage FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim WORKDIR /app COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8761 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for the eureka-server service # Build stage FROM maven:3.8.8-openjdk-17 AS builder WORKDIR /workspace COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src/ RUN mvn -B -DskipTests package
# Run stage FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim WORKDIR /app COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8761 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for the gateway service # Build stage FROM maven:3.8.8-openjdk-17 AS builder WORKDIR /workspace # copy only what is needed to leverage build cache COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src/
RUN mvn -B -DskipTests package
# Run stage FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim WORKDIR /app COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for the gateway service # Build stage FROM maven:3.8.8-openjdk-17 AS builder WORKDIR /workspace # copy only what is needed to leverage build cache COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src/
RUN mvn -B -DskipTests package
# Run stage FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim WORKDIR /app COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]
